integration_validation_v2.gap: Both assigned test files prove the MT only in-memory/on-disk and never touch the managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger that the contract's proof_target ('runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger') demands.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/flight_recorder_span_tests.rs:19-33,79-95 all assert against StubFrRecorder.events (in-memory Vec, src/.../spans.rs:184-206); tests/fr_event_registry_tests.rs:39-44,60-100 validate the on-disk FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json vs the Rust enum (std::fs::read_to_string), no PG. The impl is genuinely real (42-family registry, RAII span guard with 16-attr bounding) and a real EventLedger path exists (spans.rs:657,731 AggregateQueryBackend::Postgres on kernel_event_ledger; span_repo.rs SpanRepo) but is proven only by other non-assigned test files. No deferred-live escape present (sr1 PASS).

integration_validation_v3.evidence: NEW tests/fr_event_families_pg_validation_tests.rs mt196_all_fr_event_families_persist_to_event_ledger_and_match_validation_rows (:80-237): emits one event per FR family through PRODUCTION PostgresFrRecorder batched pipeline (fr_emitter.rs:632-691), deterministic flush via shutdown, re-reads kernel_event_ledger rows from managed PG asserting set-equality persisted families == FrEventId::all() == FrEventRegistry::from_rust_enum() validation rows (ALL and ONLY), each row aggregated on a span persisted/re-read via production SpanRepo. Exactly the managed proof V2 said was missing.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-196 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Event Validation Matrix -- Create validation rows for all Flight Recorder event families only.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Flight Recorder Event Validation Matrix
